scripts.release: ait build && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8'));const d=new Date();const date=d.getFullYear().toString().slice(2)+String(d.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0')+String(d.getDate()).padStart(2,'0');const name='releases/sugunsugun-v'+pkg.version+'-'+date+'.ait';fs.copyFileSync('sugunsugun.ait',name);console.log('릴리즈 저장:', name);"
